original_image_tags: At the bottom of the page, there are several stamps and handwritten notes.

elements.description: A blue rectangular 'DECLASSIFIED' stamp with 'Authority: NND 90986' text inside a white box. Located in the bottom left area of the page.
Standard form text 'STANDARD FORM NO. 64' at the top left corner.
A stamped or written red date '57 APR 1 1952' at the bottom left.
A stamped date 'MAR 25 1952' near the bottom right.
Typed and stamped text 'RECORDED - 79', 'INDEXED - 79', 'EX-125' in the bottom center-right area.

judge.reason: Both sides agree on the presence of stamps/handwritten notes at the bottom, but Description B provides specific verbatim text and details (e.g., 'DECLASSIFIED', dates, 'STANDARD FORM NO. 64') that Description A omits entirely without contradicting them.
